description: During a routine service, a technician notes the cabin air filter is dirty and recommends replacement.

nodes.task_description: The technician adds a note to the repair order recommending a cabin air filter replacement due to dirt and debris.

expected_outcome.expected: The recommendation is logged in the system.

nodes.task_description: The service advisor explains the benefit of replacing the filter (improved air quality in the cabin) and provides the cost.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent clearly explains the recommendation and price to the customer.

nodes.task_description: Upon customer approval, the technician replaces the filter.

expected_outcome.expected: The customer approves, and the service is completed.
